title: Tarnów, Lesser Poland — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Tarnów, Lesser Poland: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Tarnów is a city in Lesser Poland with a population of 108,470. A charming Renaissance city in southern Poland, known for its beautifully preserved market square, historic Jewish heritage, and mild microclimate.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
